variants.text: How the TikTok Algorithm Works: TikTok recommends based on user interactions, video information, and device/account settings themes disclosed by the platform.

How the TikTok Algorithm Works

TikTok recommends based on user interactions, video information, and device/account settings themes disclosed by the platform. Treat explanations as evolving models, not fixed formulas.

Key takeaways:
• Public disclosures beat rumors
• Creative tests beat superstition
• Avoid claiming secret ranking weights
